steps.title: Find the x-intercept by setting h(x) = 0
steps.content:
The x-intercept occurs where $y = h(x) = 0$. Set up the equation:
$$5x + 35 = 0$$
$$5x = -35$$
$$x = -7$$
So $a = -7$.

steps.title: Find the y-intercept and compute the sum
steps.content:
The y-intercept occurs at $x = 0$:
$$h(0) = 5(0) + 35 = 35$$
So $b = 35$.

Add the intercepts:
$$a + b = -7 + 35 = 28$$
A is correct.
